ruby.title: Probability Analysis
ruby.insight: Model placed giles glory at position 2 (20.0% probability) vs top pick Electrocution (25.0%). Underestimated winning horse by ~5.0 percentage points.

keenan.title: Forecast & Distribution
keenan.insight: Top forecast prediction was Electrocution > Giles Glory, but actual result was Giles Glory > Oh So Perfect. Distribution model underestimated variance in placing combinations.

mordin.title: Market Alignment
mordin.insight: Winner Giles Glory had well-aligned model/market values (divergence 0.0%). Market pricing efficient for this outcome.
